privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Finger Tapping Test (FTT) data. All metadata claims are confirmed: the raw data is generated at '/home/ga/pebl/data/ftt_tap_data.csv' and the expected output is '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/ftt_report.json'. The setup script explicitly injects participant 'P99' with a hardware key-repeat artifact (~33ms ITI), matching the contaminated_participant and contamination_type claims.
